description:
Step 2 of 22.4. With .4.1 dropping the body's all-Tagged force, this fixes the producer side: MakeClosure stores captures in the body's narrow repr, and CallClosure / TailCallClosure builds its indirect-call sig from the closure's body sig (resolved via the closure Var's Descr).

## Touch

### MakeClosure (src/ir_codegen.rs ~5529)
Today: captures stored *tagged* into cl+24+8*i.
Change: coerce each capture to `param_reprs[cl_sid][i]` (body's narrow capture repr — first `captured.len()` slots in the body's param_reprs). Same shape as 21.2 did for cont captures.

### CallClosure (src/ir_codegen.rs ~4272-4287)
Today: hardcoded sig is all-Tagged; args coerced to Tagged.
Change: resolve body_sid from closure Var's Descr (via spec_registry); build sig from `param_reprs[body_sid]` (arg slots, then self, then cont); coerce each arg to its body-typed repr.

Fallback: if the closure Descr doesn't resolve to a unique narrow spec (e.g., is `(any) -> any` after widening), use the all-Tagged spec. The spec_registry already has both narrow and `[any, any...]` keys registered for polymorphically-used lambdas.

### TailCallClosure (src/ir_codegen.rs ~4299-4360)
Same as CallClosure: build sig from body's param_reprs, coerce args.

## Body entry harness

src/ir_codegen.rs cont-fn entry harness already loads captures by `param_reprs[i].cl_type()` (21.2). The closure-target fn entry harness (different code path — non-cont native fns with closure-target sig) needs the same treatment if it doesn't already.

Pre-flight: verify whether the closure-target body's entry harness already honors param_reprs. If yes, this ticket touches only MakeClosure + CallClosure + TailCallClosure.

## Acceptance

- cargo test --workspace green; 459 lib tests pass.
- Closure-using fixtures: correctness restored. higher_order.fz / fact_5.fz / etc. produce correct output.
- Goldens diff cleanly: closure body params raw, MakeClosure capture stores raw, CallClosure indirect-call sigs typed.
- New expect_clif_excludes assertions on closure-using fixtures lock in the typed seam (analogous to 21.3).
title: fz-cps-seam.2: typed MakeClosure capture store + CallClosure callsite
